CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL( Preferred_Channel__c,"Facebook Messenger") , IMAGE("https://assuta.my.salesforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXlK&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1559558276000", "" , 30, 30), IF( ISPICKVAL( Preferred_Channel__c,"Email") , IMAGE("https://assuta.my.salesforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXlI&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1559558276000", "" , 30, 30), IF( ISPICKVAL(Preferred_Channel__c,"WhatsApp"),IMAGE("https://assuta.my.salesforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXlV&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1559558276000", "" , 30, 30), IF( ISPICKVAL(Preferred_Channel__c,"Phone"),IMAGE("https://assuta.my.salesforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXlQ&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1559558276000", "" , 30, 30), IF( ISPICKVAL(Preferred_Channel__c,"Fax") , IMAGE("https://assuta.my.salesforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000J6Ct&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=15727925890000", "" , 30, 30), IF( ISPICKVAL(Preferred_Channel__c,"Mail") , IMAGE("https://assuta.my.salesforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXlI&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1559558276000", "" , 30, 30), IF( ISPICKVAL(Preferred_Channel__c ,"SMS"),IMAGE("https://assuta.my.salesforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXlS&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1559558276000", "" , 30, 30), "")))))))
CustomField.label: Preferred Channel Icon
